description: Letter from Salama b. Nissim b. Ishaq al-Barki, from Busir, to Marduk b. Musa, Alexandria. Around 1055. Regarding money and goods that were delivered for the writer, from the Maghreb to Alexandria. Salama sends instructions what to send him to Busir, by Yosef b. Musa al-Tāhartī, what to sell in Alexandria, and what to keep there for the winter. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #644) VMR
